title: Architecture Exploration
description: Explore RevDeck v0.1 architecture from RevDeck.txt and brainstorm artifacts. Map core modules, data model, storage, object graph, importer/analyzer boundaries, and integration points. Include recommended Rust crates if justified.
findings: SQLite objects/edges plus ObjectRef should be the stable core; importer/analyzer outputs normalize into objects, edges, scores, and diagnostics; Labs stay out of v0.1.

title: Implementation Exploration
description: Explore implementation approach for a fresh Rust TUI codebase. Identify project scaffold, CLI commands, Ratatui app structure, SQLite access patterns, binary parsing/indexing flow, command bar, and testing patterns.
findings: Use a Rust workspace with CLI/core/db/index/tui crates, deterministic fixtures, SQLite repositories, symbol-first indexing, Ratatui Elm-style state, and CLI smoke tests.

title: UX And Product Exploration
description: Explore v0.1 product workflow, TUI layout, navigation model, Function Radar behavior, analysis memory, findings export, and acceptance criteria from an analyst perspective.
findings: Keep one analyst loop: import binary, inspect Function Radar, jump evidence, add memory, create finding, export Markdown/JSON; selected ObjectRef and history must be shared across lenses.

title: Risk And Test Exploration
description: Explore risk factors and test strategy. Cover binary fixture determinism, function-boundary accuracy, scoring explainability, migration safety, TUI state tests, command parser tests, and report round trips.
findings: Treat determinism as a product invariant across fixtures, stable IDs, score reasons, migrations, command execution, TUI state, and report exports.

title: Plan Generation
description: Consume all exploration findings plus RevDeck.txt and brainstorm feature specs. Generate feature-level plan.json in .workflow/scratch/20260513-revdeck-v01-binary-triage/plan.json and TASK JSON files under .workflow/scratch/20260513-revdeck-v01-binary-triage/.task/. Keep tasks feature-level, not per-file.
findings: Generated 6 feature-level tasks in 4 waves for RevDeck v0.1 Binary Triage MVP, covering DB/ObjectRef, indexing, navigation/commands, Function Radar, memory/findings/export, and Ratatui integration.
